name: Lanesha Minnix
background: Ms. Minnix has served as Senior Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since June 2023. Prior to joining Flowserve, she served as Senior Vice President, General Counsel and Corporate Secretary of Ecolab Inc. from March 2022 to June 2023.
